title: Interoperability
description: Ability of different information technology systems and software applications to communicate, exchange data, and use the exchanged information, including interoperable discovery and access across c...

definitions.definition: Ability of different information technology systems and software applications to communicate, exchange data, and use the exchanged information, including interoperable discovery and access across catalogues and data formats.
definitions.sources:
- [CEOS/WGISS/DSIG/GLOS](https://ceos.org/document_management/Working_Groups/WGISS/Interest_Groups/Data_Stewardship/White_Papers/EO-DataStewardshipGlossary.pdf)
